title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, generate, embed with any model served by Ollama.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node, Deno, Bun and modern browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration for Ollama models; chat, tools, embeddings and structured output.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich chat web UI for Ollama (now renamed Open WebUI); markdown, code highlighting, RAG, admin panel.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with Spring Boot starters and fluent API.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing async bindings to Ollama’s REST API.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot-like pair programmer.

title: ollama-chatbot-ui
summary: Lightweight React chat interface for Ollama, deployable as a static site or Docker container.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling and model preload support.

title: ollama-npm (npm wrapper)
summary: Official npm package wrapping Ollama REST API for Node/Deno/browser.

title: ollama-embeddings
summary: Utility repo demonstrating how to generate embeddings with Ollama and store them in vector DBs.

title: ollama-cli-tools
summary: Collection of shell scripts to pull, list, delete and benchmark Ollama models from the terminal.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that chats and generates images using Ollama backends.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit app template for chatting with any Ollama model, including speech-to-text and RAG.

title: ollama-terraform
summary: Terraform module to spin up GPU-enabled AWS EC2 instances with Ollama pre-installed.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module for CI pipelines that caches and serves Ollama models inside ephemeral containers.

title: ollama-rag-chatbot
summary: End-to-end RAG chatbot using Ollama for generation and embeddings, Chroma as vector store.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack Bolt app that adds /ollama slash command to query local models securely.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration letting you use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.
